user_query: I'm creating a mailing list for my newsletter and want to ensure the email addresses are valid. Can you verify the email addresses in my list and suggest alternative domains for disposable ones? Additionally, I'd like to check if any of the email addresses belong to role accounts.

TaskList.description: Verify the validity of email addresses in the mailing list.
Identify disposable email addresses from the list and suggest alternative domains.
Check if any email addresses belong to role accounts (e.g., info@, support@).
